positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a group of friendly forest animals (foxes, deer, raccoons) gathering at a magical, glowing portal amongst overgrown flora. The art style should be highly detailed whimsical storybook illustration, reminiscent of vintage botanical prints mixed with modern vector art. Use rich emerald, sapphire, and gold accents against deep jungle greens. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast. The composition must be centralized, making the portal the focal point, with the animals arranged naturally around it. Perfect for a repeating or single-placement apparel print. Crisp linework, highly saturated colors, vibrant lighting, deep shadows, intricate detail, symmetrical composition.
